summary: AdviceOS Compliance Features Testing - Iteration 95. All 30 backend API tests passed (100%). Tested: Immutable Audit Service with hash chaining, Security Controls with RBAC, and Object Storage for audit exports. All ASIC/APRA/ISO compliance features working correctly.
seed_data_creation: Test audit events created with TEST_ prefix for licensee_id (TEST_lic_001, TEST_lic_chain). Test API keys and custom roles created with TEST_ prefix.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new compliance features verified working. Audit Service creates immutable logs with SHA-256 hash chaining. Security Controls has 6 default RBAC roles (super_admin, licensee_admin, compliance_officer, adviser, support_staff, auditor). Object Storage is configured with EMERGENT_LLM_KEY and successfully saves audit exports to Emergent storage.

features_verified.Health Check - New Services: PASS - audit_service, security_controls, object_storage all True in health response
features_verified.Audit Service - POST /api/audit/log: PASS - Creates immutable audit log with hash chaining, returns event_id starting with evt_
features_verified.Audit Service - GET /api/audit/events: PASS - Queries audit events with filtering by licensee_id, user_id, entity_type
features_verified.Audit Service - GET /api/audit/chain/ver: PASS - Verifies hash chain integrity, returns valid=True
features_verified.Audit Service - POST /api/audit/export: PASS - Exports audit pack with certificate and signature
features_verified.Audit Service - POST /api/audit/export?s: PASS - Exports and saves to Emergent object storage
features_verified.Audit Service - Hash Chain Multiple Even: PASS - Chain remains valid after multiple sequential events
features_verified.Audit Service - GET /api/audit/statistic: PASS - Returns total_events, today, last_7_days, retention_policy=7_years
features_verified.Audit Service - GET /api/audit/user/{use: PASS - Returns user activity with event breakdown
features_verified.Security Controls - GET /api/security/ro: PASS - Lists all roles with count
PASS - Returns role with permissions, 404 for nonexistent
features_verified.Security Controls - POST /api/security/c: PASS - Checks user permission against role
features_verified.Security Controls - POST /api/security/a: PASS - Generates API key starting with wc_
features_verified.Security Controls - POST /api/security/r: PASS - Creates custom role with permissions
features_verified.Security Controls - GET /api/security/ev: PASS - Retrieves security events with filtering
features_verified.Object Storage - GET /api/storage/status: PASS - Returns status, key_configured=True, capabilities include audit_exports
features_verified.Object Storage - POST /api/storage/init: PASS - Initializes storage connection with Emergent
features_verified.Object Storage - GET /api/storage/audit-: PASS - Lists audit exports for licensee
